steps.title: Find the shared feature
steps.content: The strongest signal in the notes is that both the Crocodile Lake NWR and the Pearl Harbor NWR were each established to protect an endangered species. This identical purpose is the similarity the student needs to emphasize.

steps.title: Select the choice that highlights both refuges' shared purpose
steps.content: Choice A uses “Both” to directly state that each refuge was established to protect an endangered species. The other choices either name only one refuge (B and D) or emphasize their difference in size (C). That matches choice A — A is correct.
